moments.title: Commonwealth Games kick off in Glasgow
moments.blurb: The Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games begin this Thursday, July 23rd, bringing elite sport and inclusive competition to four major venues across the city until August 2nd.

angles.name: Opening Excitement
angles.copy: Glasgow gets ready to host the Commonwealth Games from Thursday! What events are you most looking forward to?

angles.name: Scottish Spotlight
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games are heading to Glasgow this week! Get ready for 10 days of incredible sporting action on home soil.

moments.title: Tour de France reaches dramatic conclusion
moments.blurb: The 2026 Tour de France, which began in Barcelona on July 4th, culminates this Sunday, July 26th, with the traditional final stage on the Champs-Élysées in Paris.

angles.name: Final Stage Anticipation
angles.copy: It's the final week of the Tour de France! Who's going to claim the yellow jersey on the Champs-Élysées this Sunday?

angles.name: Cycling Buzz
angles.copy: Three weeks of gruelling racing comes to an end this weekend as the Tour de France finishes in Paris. What a ride it's been!

moments.title: Latitude Festival returns to Suffolk
moments.blurb: Klarna presents Latitude Festival takes place this week from July 23rd to 26th at Henham Park, Suffolk, celebrating 20 years of music, arts, and culture.

angles.name: Festival Gates Open
angles.copy: Latitude Festival kicks off in Suffolk on Thursday! Who are you excited to see at Henham Park this weekend?

angles.name: Suffolk Summer
angles.copy: Henham Park is calling! Latitude Festival is back this week, bringing incredible music, comedy, and more to Suffolk. Expect dry conditions and sunshine!

moments.title: Together Again Festival in Cheshire
moments.blurb: The Together Again Festival returns to Bolesworth Castle in Cheshire from July 24th to 26th, offering a mix of world-class music, vibrant arenas, and a family-friendly atmosphere.

angles.name: Cheshire Calling
angles.copy: Together Again Festival is back at Bolesworth Castle this weekend! Get ready for three days of music, arts, and good vibes in Cheshire.

angles.name: Festival Fun
angles.copy: If you're heading to Together Again Festival this weekend, expect a mix of tech house, disco, bass, and Rewind Arena classics!

moments.title: Love Island 2026 grand finale
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island concludes with its grand finale this Monday, July 27th, live on ITV2 and ITVX, as the remaining couples battle for the £50,000 prize.

angles.name: Who Will Win?
angles.copy: It's the final week in the Love Island villa! Who do you think will be crowned the winners and take home the £50k this Monday?

angles.name: Summer of Love Ends
angles.copy: After eight weeks of drama, romance, and 'I've got a text!', the Love Island 2026 final is just days away. Tune in Monday to see who wins!

moments.title: George Clinton turns 85
moments.blurb: The legendary 'Godfather of Funk,' George Clinton, celebrates his 85th birthday tomorrow, July 22nd.

angles.name: Funk Legend
angles.copy: Happy 85th birthday tomorrow to the one and only George Clinton! Get down with some P-Funk to celebrate the legend.

angles.name: Godfather of Funk
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate 85 years of funk with George Clinton! What's your favourite Parliament-Funkadelic track?

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez's 57th birthday
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on Thursday, July 24th.

angles.name: JLo Day
angles.copy: Happy 57th birthday to the one, the only, Jennifer Lopez this Thursday! What's your go-to J.Lo anthem?

angles.name: Jenny from the Block
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate J.Lo's birthday on Thursday! The multi-talented superstar turns 57. Feeling the love for her hits!

moments.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
moments.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday this Friday, July 26th. (Verified: Mick Jagger was born July 26, 1943).

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Icon
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger this Friday! Let's roll out some Stones classics to celebrate.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: 83 years young! Mick Jagger's birthday is Friday. What's your favourite Rolling Stones track to get you moving?

moments.title: Don Henley is 79
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder and drummer Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Raise a glass to Don Henley, who turns 79 tomorrow! Celebrate the Eagles legend with some classic rock.

angles.name: Hotel California Vibes
angles.copy: It's Don Henley's birthday tomorrow! What's your favourite Eagles song, or a classic from his solo career?

moments.title: Selena Gomez turns 34
moments.blurb: Singer and actress Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday tomorrow, July 22nd.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Happy 34th birthday to Selena Gomez tomorrow! What's your favourite track from the pop superstar?

angles.name: Celebrating Selena
angles.copy: Tomorrow is Selena Gomez's birthday! Get ready to play her biggest hits all day to celebrate her turning 34.

moments.title: New entries on the UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: The latest Official UK Singles Chart for the week ending July 17th sees new entries and climbers, with Madonna's 'Danceteria' and Shakira & Burna Boy's 'Dai Dai' making waves.

angles.name: Chart Rundown
angles.copy: Fresh new entries on the UK Singles Chart! Madonna, Shakira & Burna Boy, and Alyssa Grace are all making moves. What's your favourite new tune?

angles.name: Madonna's Chart Impact
angles.copy: Madonna's 'Danceteria' is a big new entry on the UK Singles Chart! Incredible to see the Queen of Pop still dominating.

moments.title: Mixed summer weather continues across UK
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing a mixed bag of summer weather this week, with warm spells in the south and east, potential for showers in the north, and a heatwave possibly brewing for early August.

angles.name: Summer Vibes Check
angles.copy: It's a classic British summer this week: sunshine and showers! Keep those sunglasses AND umbrellas handy.

angles.name: Festival Weather Report
angles.copy: Good news for festival-goers this week: largely favourable weather with dry spells and sunshine expected at most events across the UK!

moments.title: Adam Lambert plays London's Roundhouse
moments.blurb: Adam Lambert performs tonight at the Roundhouse in London, as part of his UK tour.

angles.name: London Calling
angles.copy: Adam Lambert is at the Roundhouse in London tonight! Who's heading out to see the incredible performer?

angles.name: Live Tonight
angles.copy: If you're in London, Adam Lambert is playing the Roundhouse tonight! Get ready for a powerhouse vocal performance.

moments.title: AIG Women's Open at Royal Lytham & St Annes
moments.blurb: The AIG Women's Open, one of women's golf's most prestigious tournaments, takes place next week from July 29th to August 2nd at Royal Lytham & St Annes.

angles.name: Women's Golf
angles.copy: Next week, the AIG Women's Open heads to Royal Lytham & St Annes! Get ready for world-class golf action.

angles.name: Lancashire Links
angles.copy: The world's top women golfers will be in Lancashire next week for the AIG Women's Open. Who are you backing for the title?

moments.title: The Open Championship review
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship concluded this past Sunday, July 19th, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club, where Ryan Fox became the third New Zealander to win a golf major.

angles.name: Golf Highlights
angles.copy: Still buzzing from The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale! Congratulations to Ryan Fox on a historic win this weekend.

angles.name: Major Recap
angles.copy: What a weekend of golf at The Open! Royal Birkdale delivered, and we saw a new major champion crowned. What were your highlights?
